data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will continue to bring showers and a few squally thunderstorms to the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. The trough of low pressure is expected to weaken on Monday. The weather will be brighter early to midweek next week. Meanwhile, an easterly airstream will affect the coastal areas of Guangdong midweek next week. With the strengthening of an anticyclone aloft, the weather will improve and it will be hot during the day over Guangdong in the latter part of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260405","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 3 to 4, force 5 later, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and a few squally thunderstorms.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":23,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":75,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":63,"PSR":"High"},{"forecastDate":"20260406","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"South force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.
